zh.Great Carleton, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾格亞特 卡爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lord Walter de Carleton是Lord Swain of Carleton的兒子，於1172年出生在英國。他至少有2個兒子。他於1200年住在英國藍卡爾格亞特 卡爾頓。他去世於1226年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾格亞特 卡爾頓享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Lord Walter de Carleton was born in 1172, in England as the son of Lord Swain of Carleton. He had at least 2 sons. He lived in Great Carleton, Lancashire, England in 1200. He died in 1226, in Great Carleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lord Walter de Carleton est né en 1172, à Angleterre, fils de Lord Swain of Carleton. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. Il a vécu à Great Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre en 1200. Il est décédé en 1226, à Great Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ja.Great Carleton, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアグレアト カーレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Lord Walter de Carletonは1172年にイギリスでLord Swain of Carletonの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1200年にはイギリスランカシュアイアグレアト カーレトンに住んでいた。彼は1226年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアグレアト カーレトンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Walter de Carleton(은)는 1172년 영국에서 Lord Swain of Carleton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1200년도에 영국 랭카실르 그리트 칼턴에서 살았다. 그는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 그리트 칼턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lord Walter de Carleton родился в 1172 г. в местности Англия. Его отца звали Lord Swain of Carleton. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он жил в местности грит карлетон, ланкашир, Англия в 1200 году. Он умер в 1226 г. в местности грит карлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
